zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances Trussell於大約1226年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可維其哈布盧可時，她的父親Richard De Trussell31歲，母親Isabel de Malesours24歲。她於大約1238年與Walter de Clopton II在英國英格蘭素福爾可維其哈布盧可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1295年在英國英格蘭素福爾可朗 梅爾福德享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frances Trussell于大约1226年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可維其哈布盧可时，她的父亲Richard De Trussell31岁，母亲Isabel de Malesours24岁。她于大约1238年与Walter de Clopton II在英国英格兰素福爾可維其哈布盧可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1295年在英国英格兰素福爾可朗 梅爾福德享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Trussell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Middle English trus(s)el(le) ‘bundle, parcel’ (Old French troussel), perhaps for a porter (see Truss ), or from the same word in the sense ‘stamp, mould (for stamping coins)’, for someone who minted coins.
variant of Thrussell, a nickname from Middle English thros(t)el, thrus(t)el ‘song thrush’ (Old English thros(t)le). Compare Thrush .

variants.name: Truss
meanings: English (mainly Essex and Middlesex): metonymic occupational name from Middle English trusse ‘bundle, package’ (Old French trousse), perhaps for a porter. See also Trussell .
Americanized form of Ukrainian Trus: nickname from trus ‘rabbit’, typically applied to someone thought to be a coward.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Frances Trussell was born about 1226, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard De Trussell, was 31 and her mother, Isabel de Malesours, was 24. She married Walter de Clopton II about 1238, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1295, in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Frances Trussell est née environ 1226, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard De Trussell, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Malesours, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Clopton II environ 1238, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1295, à Long Melford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United K: Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Frances Trussell um 1226 in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard De Trussell 31 und ihre Mutter Isabel de Malesours 24. Sie hat um 1238 in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Walter de Clopton II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1295 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Long Melford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Trussell è nata il circa 1226 nel Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard De Trussell, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Isabel de Malesours, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Walter de Clopton II circa 1238, nel Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1295, nel Long Melford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Trussellが約1226年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークで生まれた時，父Richard De Trussellは31歳，母Isabel de Malesoursは24歳であった。約1238年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークでWalter de Clopton IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1295年にイギリスイギリススフォルクロング メルフォードで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Trussell(이)가 대략 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard De Trussell(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel de Malesours(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 대략 1238년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 Walter de Clopton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1295년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 론그 멜퍼드에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Frances Trussell nasceu aproximadamente 1226, em Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard De Trussell, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Malesours, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter de Clopton II aproximadamente 1238, em Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1295, em Long Melford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frances Trussell родилась около 1226 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard De Trussell было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Malesours, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Clopton II около 1238 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1295 г. в местности лонг мелфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.
